subcodes.first_line: O ye twin luminaries of the love of God in the land of Egypt! At the evening hour have I confined my moments to the task of writing, so that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شمع محبت الله در کشور مصر در وقت عصر اوقات خویش را بتحریر حصر نمودم تا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @exhortations and counsels, @past, present and future of Iran
